diagrams.title: Merging Two Sorted Linked Lists
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step merge of L1: 2→4→6 and L2: 1→3→5→7 into result list
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how pointers advance and links are rewired during merge operation - key to understanding O(m+n) complexity

diagrams.title: Iterative Reversal Process
diagrams.description: Three-state visualization showing prev, current, next pointers during reversal of singly linked list
elements: Direction arrows showing next pointer reversal
diagrams.purpose: Clarify pointer manipulation sequence - many students struggle with understanding how prev/current/next evolve

diagrams.title: Sparse Matrix Linked Representation
diagrams.description: Orthogonal linked list for 4×4 matrix with 3 non-zero elements showing row and column chains
diagrams.purpose: Show how non-zero elements form intersecting row and column chains, enabling efficient access in both dimensions
